concept: I would enjoy a turn-based game where I command a caravan of merchants traveling between bizarre pocket dimensions, each with unique physical laws and economies. Trade goods undergo unexpected transformations when transported between dimensions - water might become solid gems, simple tools might gain sentience, or living creatures might turn into architectural elements. Rival caravans compete for the most profitable trade routes, sometimes forming temporary alliances when facing dimensional anomalies or predatory entities. My choices gradually shape the multiverse economy, potentially creating new dimensions born from particularly successful trade patterns.
